summary: Iteration 25 - BQT Food Cost & Portion Sizing Enhancement Testing Complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: MaestroBQT BEO Operations tab renders correctly with Food Cost Analysis card, portion sizes (oz), DUO badges, and duo protein split display. New endpoints tested: GET /api/event-workflow/bqt-portion-standards (14-18% target, 6-8oz entree, 8oz duo), POST /api/event-workflow/food-cost-analysis (returns status, recommendations, item_analysis with portion validation), POST /api/event-workflow/attach-menu with portion_size_oz, is_duo, duo_proteins, duo_split_oz. BEO documents include food_cost_target_min_pct=14 and food_cost_target_max_pct=18. Post-financials includes bqt_target_range and food_cost_status in COGS.
critical_code_review_comments: BQT_PORTION_STANDARDS constant correctly defines 14-18% food cost target and portion sizes
Entree portion standard: 6-8oz for single, 8oz total for duo - correctly implemented
Duo entree support: is_duo, duo_proteins, duo_split_oz fields properly saved and retrieved
Food cost analysis validates portions against BQT standards with ok/under/over status
FoodCostCard component renders correctly with visual bar, metrics, and recommendations
Menu items display portion sizes (oz) and DUO badges with protein split details
Post-financials COGS section includes bqt_target_range and food_cost_status
Changelog tracks food_cost_analyzed action with percentage and status
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed events: TEST_BQT_Portion_Event (100 guests, duo entree with 5oz+3oz split), TEST_FoodCost_Analysis (50 guests), TEST_Financials_BQT (75 guests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified BQT food cost and portion sizing enhancement. Key endpoints: GET /api/event-workflow/bqt-portion-standards returns BQT_PORTION_STANDARDS with food_cost_target_min=14, food_cost_target_max=18, portions for appetizer (3-5oz), entree (6-8oz), entree_duo (8oz), dessert (4-6oz). POST /api/event-workflow/attach-menu accepts portion_size_oz, is_duo, duo_proteins, duo_split_oz. POST /api/event-workflow/food-cost-analysis returns status (below_target/on_target/above_target), recommendations, item_analysis with portion_status validation. Frontend BEOWorkflow.tsx FoodCostCard component renders in MaestroBQT BEO Operations tab. Food cost is $0 since recipes don't have ingredient costs yet - that's expected per main agent note.

frontend_tests.food_cost_analysis_card: PASS - Shows 0%, Target: 14-18%, BELOW TARGET badge
frontend_tests.duo_protein_split_display: PASS - Shows Filet Mignon (5oz), Lobster Tail (3oz)

mocked_apis_list: AI recipe generation uses real Emergent LLM Key but not tested in this iteration
Food cost is $0 since recipes don't have ingredient costs - expected behavior

frontend_beo_workflow.portion_display: Shows oz values for each menu item
frontend_beo_workflow.duo_badges: DUO badge with protein split details
